title: hyssopus officinalis subsp. aristatus
intro: Hyssopus officinalis subsp. aristatus, also known as upright catmint or Greek hyssop, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Hyssopus officinalis. It is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress and anxiety. Upright catmint can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used to make herbal remedies for respiratory and digestive health issues.
